---
title: "Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="27.96" data-elevation="3127.62">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>27.96</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3127.62 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br>65/100</p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Route

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>19.14</td>
      <td>68.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>3.90</td>
      <td>14.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>2.24</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.00</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.67</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>route_part</th>
      <th>road_name</th>
      <th>distance_mi</th>
      <th>time_low_min</th>
      <th>time_fast_min</th>
      <th>rest_time_after_min</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>10.1</td>
      <td>128.0</td>
      <td>62.0</td>
      <td>97.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Keith Avenue</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (hard)</td>
      <td>Golden Gate Avenue</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Broadway</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Caldecott Lane</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>38.0</td>
      <td>19.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>30.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Pinehurst Road</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>23.0</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
      <td>27.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Mountain Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Warren Freeway</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>pci_available</th>
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>7.7</td>
      <td>27.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>6.9</td>
      <td>24.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
      <td>21.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>3.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Secondary (Unknown)</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
